titleStmt.title: SII 15.241: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 241. (B.K. No. 205 of 1926-27.) NIḌGUNDI, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone inside the Basavaṇṇa temple.

This is dated Śaka 1096, Jaya, Mārggaśīra-paurṇami, Monday, lunar eclipse, corresponding to 1174 A.D., November 10. The weekday, however, was Sunday. The Sinda chief Vīra-Bijjaḷa stated to have been ruling at this time.

It records a gift of money made into the hands of the Mahājanas in favour of the god Mādhavēśvara whose temple was constructed at Niḍugundi by the donor Karagavaḷaradhishṭhāyaka Mahādēva-daṇḍanāyaka, who is described as the right hand of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Vīra-Bijjala. It also registers other gifts including one for the maintenance of a satra. The earlier part of the inscription contains a genealogical account of the Sinda chief and a description of the Four Hundred Mahājanas of Niḍugundi. The epigraph is partly damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī jayatyāviṣk® gra
viśrāṁtabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ . svasti samasta jaga taḷa ṁtadaṟoḷu sōma ratnarāśi nāḍe
mesaguṁ . ghanagāṁbhīryyavudīrṇnasatva bhṛdrakṣaṇatvaṁ purātana sīmāsthiti tāṁ guṇaguṇalasa
dratnākaratvaṁ dṛḍhadhvanighōṣaṁ puruṣōttamāśrayavenippoḷpiṁ mahādēvanōḷvinoḷō raṁnavenalu jagaṁ sūgayi
kuṁ ratnākaraṁ śrīkaraṁ . mattaṁ . siriya tavarmane havaḷada haravari muttugaḷa huṭṭaje caṁdrana tāyi hariyirppa sajjeva
ne ratnarāśiyamardina nidhānaveḷe veṇnuḍanūlu . Ene celviṁ jaḷarāśi suttuvire jaṁbū dvīpa voppippudā vinuta dvīpada madhya
doḷu divijadhātrīṁdraṁ manaṁgoḷvudā kanakādrīṁdrada taṁka bhārata varā viyu bhāra tā kāṁtāsarakuṁtaḷaṁ
bolesaguṁ śrī kuṁtaḷōrvvītaḷaṁ . śrīmajjanasēvyaṁ sumanōmāḷārājabaha yaveṁbī mahimeyineṇeyādudiḷāvaḷe
ya kuntaḷakke kuntaḷadēśaṁ . Anupama kuntaḷasthaḷadoḷūppa suvarṇnavinūta ratna venisuvantiresaye kisukāḍunāḍu
saypina nele rājisirppudadaṟoḷu bhuvanastuta rājadhāni celuvinakaṇi yādara visi lāśrayavoppi tōṟuguṁ . Ā
varapuramaṁ vijayaśrīdharanosadāḷvanamaḷasiṁdānvayalakṣmīdharanenisida bijjaladēva nṛpati kū
sutanadoḷe pṛthuḷaparākramanāṁtavolbijjayyaṁ mathitaripumaṁḍaḷēśa parā kramamanātanā bālyadoḷaṁ . Ā
jagatprasiddhana prasiddhavaṁśāvatāraveṁtene . moneyaḷorppaṁ tōṟutu kaṭṭidalaginaṁte
sedanācarasamaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ bhūtaḷadoḷu . doṟevaḍedādimaṁḍaḷika mahīśano
ḷu dhāriṇīśvarana cavuṁḍamaṁḍaḷikavīrana cāmanarēṁdranoḷpu vistarisidudalli lalāmaṁ bhujaba
ḷamaṁḍaḷikabhīmanesadaṁ vijitāṁgajarūpaṁ śauryyanaṁbudhi vikramanudā ṇagegeṭṭidu
nalaṁceyanutta hulgarccidoḍaṁtāvaga māḍisidanalladoḍāvagavācugi jalana nidhi bhōreṁdu kavi
ye takṣaṇadiṁduppinakaṭṭe karagidaṁtuppinakaṭṭe jaḷapravāha negaḷeṁta
kava kālamahābhraghōṣaveṁbudu ḷuripu
raṇāgradoḷu . negaḷdācugimaṁḍaḷikaṁgogedaṁ vidyāvinōdanu permmāḍinṛpa . siṁdakuḷamaṁ
ḍanaṁ dayeyiṁ dānadinīśvarārccaneyineḷegasedaṁ siṁdavaṁśa cūḍā
maṇi vāgvidaciṁtāmaṇiyene negaḷdadaṭaṁ maṁḍaḷikamaṁḍana
dharavijayaṁ maṁḍaḷikamaṁḍanaṁ cāvuṁḍaṁ . Adaṭina maṁḍaḷi mikka puradēva
yanipaḍī mūvaragaṁḍaneṁdu samaradoḷu neṭṭaneṁdoḍa rpparākramadiṁdī
gaḷu śrī vīrabijjalaṁ śauryyāvasathaṁ cikkadēvaneṁba nenalu mikkubhaya
kuḷaśuddharārbbhuvanabhuṁbhukana vīra bijjalana dore mahī puṭṭadanana
kramaṁ vīrabijjala daṁḍanāyaka mahā
dēvaṁ . Ā vīrāvatārana vaṁśāvatāraventene . javanaṁ
puṭṭidaṁgaḍavenalu vāgvīryyadōrvvīryya puruṣaratna pavaḷasuvarṇna
byābhāsiguṇavaṁtaṁ śā kṣiyenippa cauḍiyakkagaṁ
vidyābaḷasahitanarātimanōbaḷa harananisi puṭṭidanā gavaḷara koṭṭaradadhiṣṭhāya
ka karuṇāṁbudhi nāga Ā nāgarasana sati mahimonidhi śōnidhi negaḷdaḷudoraveta hiri
ya mana yīśvaradēva janaka gājale tāyi nāgarasaniḷāvallabhanene dhareyoḷa
vōlva nālvarudārargguṇi nāgadēvavibhugaṁ rannavvegaṁ puṭṭidaru vara dēvadaṁḍanāyakanudātta cauṁḍa
daṁḍēśvaraṁ . Ālli . dhare pogaḷguṁ parārtthakhacarēśvarana caturōkti bhāratīśvarana rāmarēśvarananudāratāguṇagaṇāṁ prabhu
cauṁḍadhāriṇīśverana mahattarēśvarananīśvarana sujanaprasaṁnnanaṁ . Ā negaḷdīśvara kṣinidhiva camūnātha
siṁdarājyapadabhāradhuryyaṁ . bhujabaḷabhīmana tanayana bhujabaḷadoḷa bhujatiḷakanamaṁtri mādhava daṁḍanāya
kanesadaṁ . maneyoḷmahāpradhānaṁ moneyoḷu vīrapradhānanene bijjaladēvana maṁtri mādhavacamūpana nupamarūpaṁ
ṟe maṁḍaḷikadaṁḍanāyakajanarāja nijabhujadaṁḍameṁdaḍe nijakiṁkararī javana kiṁkararāgalu . gaṁḍanenalu venippā
satiyaṁ mahādēvadaṁḍanāyakanāṁta . nirupamabhadralakṣaṇaguṇānvitanuṁnate nanartthipa
ṇakaraṇiyu vinaṁpadaghātadiṁda vi tasade māṇbude pageya nābhiyoḷaṁ hāmaṁḍa
(ḍa)ḷēśvara bijjayyana dakṣadakṣiṇabhujādaṁḍa maṁḍaḷēśvaradaṁḍādhipa daṁḍanāthajavarāja śrī mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ daṁḍanāthatiḷakaṁ daṁḍā dhi
paṁ mādaṁ . kaḍupiṁ cuṁgeyasāhaṇi pramukharurvvīśaṁ besaṁ bēḷdoḍugaḷa heṁ jēṟina mallidēva baṁdeḍeneṁdātana
naṁganeyara bhaṁḍāramaṁ kādaneṁdade kāmaṁ daṁḍanāthamahādēvaṁgappu nāḍu gaḷoḷu kaḷḷanaṁdu sādhi
salaṇmarenalu nāḍāḍiya ballāḷaṁ negaḷda sitagara gaṁḍaṁ . kaligaḍadallaḷaṁ mārmma levara gorava
ḍisuva bīranalte sitagara gaṁḍaṁ . besagali meygali nijagali kasavaragali toḍarakali negaḷtaya kaliyeṁbesakade kalitanamaṁ nirmmisidanene sitake sitagara gaṁḍaṁ [.] balayuktarbba
layuktaṁ kaligaḷa kali negaḷda cāgigaḷa cāgiyenalu halavu guṇaṁgaḷgōrbbane neleyāda guṇāṁburāśi sitagara gaṁḍaṁ . Enisida mādhavadaṁḍēśana vinutajanmabhūmiyā
nāḍoḷu celvenisida niḍuguṁdi jagajjanastutyāgrahāracūḍāratnaṁ . manuvihitācārada neleyene negaḷdaru yajanayājanayājanādhyayanādhyāpanadānasatpha
lavā vinūtaralliya mahājanaṁ nālnūrbbaru . dēvagurudvijāgnipitṛpūjakaruṁ natasaptasōmasaṁsthāvabhṛthāvagāhana pavitraśarīrara
śēṣavēdavidyāvidarapratarkkyamahimāvasatharvvibudhaikavaṁdyarurbbīvinutarjjaganuta catuḥśatasaṁkhyariḷāmarōttamaru . niḍuguṁdi
navenal rājippa nālnūrbbaroḷnaḍe nālnūrvvara lōkaviśrutakaḷāsaṁpatti nālnūrvva ronnuḍinālnūrvvara dhārmikatvadesaka nālnūrvvarivārppunō
rppaḍe nālnūrbbara vidvadiṣṭaphaḷadāyitvaṁ jagatpāvanaṁ . puruṣārtthāyatanaikaratnakaḷa �ru vidvajjanāṁbhōjinīsarasijātasakharu ja
nōṁnatariḷādēvānvayōttaṁsaruddhata kīrttipramadādinātharenutuṁ dhātrītaḷaṁ santataṁ parivarṇnikuvudāra cāruguṇa nālnūrbba
. Intenisi svastiyamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭānajapasamādhiśīla guṇasaṁpaṁnarvvidvajjanaprasaṁnaviditavēdā(ta)rtthasiddhāṁtāgamaṣaṭtarkka
paṁcabyākaraṇādi samastaśāstranirnnikardēvadvijagurupadasēvānuraktarssaptasōma saṁsthāvabhṛthāvagāhanapavitragōtrarssujanaika
mitraru . śrī mūlasthāna svayaṁbhūkalidēvasvāmilabdhavaraprasādaranavaratavida(dyā) vinōdarēkavākyarenipa śrīmanmahāgrahā
ra niḍuguṁdiyūroḍeyapramukha mahājanaṁ nālnūrbbaruṁ nijagrāmāḷaṁkaraṇaga ḷappa dharmmagaḷa svadharmmadiṁ paripālisuta su
khadinire . svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhāna . vidvajjananidhāna śrīmahā maṁḍaḷēśvara vīrabijjaladēvadakṣiṇa bhujakaukṣē
yaka . sukavīṁdrajana dāyaka . sāhasōttuṁga bijjaladēvamaṁḍaḷēśvara padavīvistāraka śaraṇāyātabhītibrātanistāraka bhu
jabaḷabhīma vīrabijjayyadakṣiṇabhujadaṁḍa sitagaragaṁḍa . siṁdānvayarājyasamuddharaṇa subhaṭarābharaṇa . maṁḍaḷēśvaradaṁḍanāyakajavarāja
sūkaḷāśvārūḍhaprauḍha vatsarāja . Aṁṇanagaṁdhavāraṇa . virōdhibaḷamadanivāraṇa . pratipakṣakṣayakara . vidvadbhayaṁkara . nāma
samastaguṇasaṁpaṁnanappa śrīmat hiriya daṁḍanāyakaṁ karagavaḷaradhiṣṭhāyakaṁ bhujabaḷa daṁḍanāyakaṁ Ā niḍuguṁdiyoḷa
rtthijanānaṁdaṁ mādhavēśvarālayamaṁ lakṣmīnidhi mādhavadēvacamūnāthaṁ lōkavaṁdya vene māḍisidaṁ Aṁtu māḍisi yā mādhavēśvaradēvargge taṁma satra
kkaṁ mattaṁ samagravāge © kaḷpaneyaṁ māḷpa saṁkaḷpadi mahāgrahāra niḍuguṁdige bijayaṁ geydu sakanṛpakāḷākrāṁta
saṁvatsaraśataṁgaḷu 1096 neya jaya saṁvatsarada mārggaśira paurṇnamāsyayāditya vāṁ sōmagrahaṇa puṇyadinada�lliya mahājanaṁ nā
lnūrvvaru sabālavṛddha ṇadoḷu naredēkastharāgiralā jagatpūjyargge pādapūjeyaṁ gadyāṇa 50 koṭṭu sahiraṇya pradānavāgi pa
ḍeda paḍedeṁteṁdoḍalli yada dhanadoḷagā mādhavēśvaradēvara dēvatāpūjege patrapuṟpamumanā pūjāriya jī
vitamumaṁ saṁje sūḍareṇneymaṁ ṟiyaṁ trikālada dhūpārātriymaṁ naivēdyakke dēnagavaḷe nellu baḷḷa 2 Ā naivēdyakke mēlu bīya tiṁgaḷi
ge hoṁge hāgaṁ mahāparbbaṁgaḷa naivēdyakke pakvāṁnnamumaṁ grahaṇa saṁkramaṇagada hōmakkehavidrabyamumaṁ caitrapavi
tragaḷa bīyamumaṁ dēvāyatanada jīrṇōddhāramumanācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāge nālnūrbbarmmahājanaṁgaḷu sukṟitasākṣiyāgi
naḍayisuvaṁtāgi sasakaṭṭidanu Ā mādhavēśvaradēvarggalliyayvattokkalu biṭṭa dharmma vā vūroḷanitu gāṇa voḷavanitaṟoḷaṁ pratyēkaṁ so
ḷasige pramāṇina soṁṭigeyoṁdu . bēṟūriṁ māralu baṁdeṇneya dagaḷgella pratyēka soṁṭigeyoṁdu A Eṇneyiṁ dēvara mā
le soḍarācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi naḍevuttaṁ barppudu . mattamā dēvargge śrīmanmahā pradhānaṁ mahādēvadaṁṇḍanāyakaru koḍaga
nūra prabhu prajegaḷa kayyalu sarvvabādhāparihāra sarbbanamasyamācaṁdrārkkasthāyi yāgi yavarkkādūḍuvaṁtu paḍeda
keyyi māraholadoḷage baḍigeya sōsaneya nāyakana haṭṭagāṟavaṭṭana mattarippatta roḷage haḍuvaṇa bhō
gada mattaru hattu dēvaraṁgabhōgakke biṭṭaru . 7 . © . 7 . satrada vṛttiyeṁteṁdoḍe . niḍuguṁdiyoḷu negaḷda jakkiligēriya
nūrbbarartthisaṁtānasurōrbbījaru paramadhārmmikarāśritarakṣakaru dayāṁbhōnidhigaḷu parārtthanidhigaḷu sakaḷāgamatatvakōvida
ru bhūnutamūrttigaḷu viśadekīrttigaḷaṅjabhavānvayōttamar . Urbbīdharadhairyyaru divijōrbbījādāryyaranutuvabhivarṇnisa sarbbōrbba
re jakkiligēriya nūrvvarubhūdēvaratnamaṁḍanarasadaru . cāruguṇākararamaḷina cāri traru sakaḷadharmmarakṣakaranu
tuṁ dhāriṇi pogaḷvudu jakkiligēriya nūrbbarmmaha janaṁgaḷanolaviṁ . Aṁtanisi svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadha raṇamaunānuṣṭhāna japasamā
dhiśīlaguṇasaṁpanarappa śrīmanumahāgrahāraṁ niḍuguṁdiya jakkiligēriya mahājana nūrbbaru śrīpādaṁgaḷga pādapū
jeyaṁ koṭṭu sarbbabādhaparihāra sarbbanamasyamācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi kēriya norbba mahājanaṁgaḷu kādoḍu
vaṁtāgi paḍeda keyi mattarippattumaṁ taṁma satrakka biṭṭaru Avara sthaḷaṁgaḷāvuveṁdaḍā kēriya paṁcakada saṁkamayyana śa
tada yippattanālku mattaru nasugeyalli meyana gaṇadaleraḍuṁ gaṇavu varaya mataru 6 Ā
baḷile hāḷakēṟiya mattaru 3 Aṁtu paṁcarada gōvi dimayyana śatada hoṁna holada hasugeyali mādimeyana
bhāgadoḷage mattaru 6 Ā baḷiya māḷada ma ttaru 10 kammaṁ 180 Aṁtaraḍaṁ śatada benika sahita mataru 1 kamma 780
Ā keyyiṁdādartthadiṁ brāhmaṇarppaṁnirbba janaṁ naḍavutta barppadu . satrada ma
neyakke jakkiligēriya mahā vippataydake baḍi gadyāṇa
vaiydumanaḷḷasuggigā kēriya mahājanaṁ . © . © . © .
Ā satrada taḷige haṁneraḍa dhūpaguḍige Ārati ghaṁṭe
phala . © . © pri kurukṣē
yoḷaṁ vāraṇāsiyoḷa ḷākṣaraṁ dhātri
yoḷu . viṁdhyāṭavīṣpatōyāsu viṣamucyaThe remaining portion is lost.
Digital edition of SII 15.241 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
